base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of flagpole_flag_wave — a effect_layer (atmospheric_vfx) from 1985 super mario bros. triangular flag at pole-top toggles between 2 wave positions. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame flag alternation — triangular flag at pole-top toggles between 2 wave positions; plays continuously while level is active
